column2: # Group by IndividualID, EHYear_Extracted, and release_group, then filter to keep only the earliest observation per IndividualID and EHYear
# Now calculate the average Weight and Length by Year and release_group
# Reshape data to long format for faceting
tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(Weight_g, ForkLength_mm, Condition), names_to = "Measure", values_to = "Value")
# Boxplots for Weight and Length by Year, split by release group and colored
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = factor(EHYear_Extracted), y = Value, fill = factor(release_group))) +
labs(title = "Weight, Length, and Condition at first release, split by release group",
theme(legend.title = element_blank())  # Optionally hide legend title
